holdings.infoBox: KBWB is an equity ETF with a total of 29 individual holdings. The top holdings are Morgan Stanley stock at 9.26%, The Goldman Sachs Group at 8.87%, Bank of America at 7.96%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 7.70%, and Wells Fargo & Company at 7.29%.

overview.description: The Invesco KBW Bank ETF (KBWB) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the KBW Nasdaq Bank index, a modified market-cap-weighted index of US banking firms. KBWB was launched on Nov 1, 2011 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: Mayo Says This Is a 'New Era for Bank Consolidation' (Correction)
